details: Masquerades as an "npm-scanner" security tool but is a full C2 implant. On execution, the bin script index.js shows a fake health check to deceive the user, then installs cross-platform persistence via systemd (Linux), LaunchAgent (macOS, com.moltbook.health.plist), or a Windows Service. It then spawns dist/bundle.js as a detached background process that opens a WebSocket connection to wss://moltbook-health[.]the-l[.]ink/ws (C2 channel) and reads ~/.npmrc and ~/.npm-scanner-id for credential exfiltration. The internal branding is "Moltbook Health Monitor" and the scanner output is entirely fabricated.
